shortcuts./schema: run seo/technical-seo/schema.md on the money pages in seo/your-site/overview.md
shortcuts./visibility: run seo/ai-visibility/citations.md and log to seo/competitors/share-of-voice.csv
shortcuts./gap: run seo/agents/A8-content-gap-brief.md (3 passes, écrit les briefs dans seo/state/content-gap-queue.md)
shortcuts./brief: run seo/content-strategy/content-briefs.md on the top item of the latest content-gap output
shortcuts./report: run seo/reporting/weekly-report.md on fresh seo/gsc-data/ exports and update the dashboard
shortcuts./refresh: pick the top page-2 prisoner from the latest weekly report and produce its refresh brief
shortcuts./links: run seo/agents/A7-internal-link-finder.md (node scripts/internal-link-finder.mjs depuis la machine de l utilisateur)

output_rules: every report ends with ONE recommended action sized under 4 hours
never smooth over declines; money pages flagged at any decline
all data claims dated; verify against Supabase or GSC, never guess
